# CWE-22 negative: path confined under baseDir after Clean
lang: go
file: CWE-22-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"path/filepath"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-22 Improper Limitation of a Pathname to a Restricted Directory (mitigated)
func DownloadArtifact(c *gin.Context) {
	baseDir := "/var/app/storage"
	name := c.Param("name")
	target := filepath.Join(baseDir, filepath.Clean("/"+name))
	if !strings.HasPrefix(target, baseDir+string(os.PathSeparator)) {
		c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "invalid"})
		return
	}
	data, err := os.ReadFile(target)
	if err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "missing"})
		return
	}
	c.Data(http.StatusOK, "application/octet-stream", data)
}
